programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Beach Murders: Whodunnit with Lori Loughlin. When a customer believes her husband's surfing death wasn't an accident, antiques expert Jennifer must dig up some secrets and find a killer. (2017)

Thriller with Allison McAtee. Needing help with her full but chaotic life, Grace hires a live-in assistant. And once Lilith is invited in, there's nothing she won't do... to get what she wants. (2021)
Thriller starring Lindsay Hartley. Two families are thrown into crisis when they discover their daughters were switched at birth - but nothing will stop one mother keeping what's hers... (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Glitters: Detective drama with Lori Loughlin. Thrifty shopper and amateur sleuth Jennifer sifts through sparkly clues when the owner of a storage unit full of antique items is murdered. (2014)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Glitters: Detective drama with Lori Loughlin. Thrifty shopper and amateur sleuth Jennifer sifts through sparkly clues when the owner of a storage unit full of antique items is murdered. (2014)
Rubble with a Cause: When a building collapse traps one of Mary's witnesses in the rubble and out in the open, his injury is secondary to the threat of an assassin on a nearby roof.
What Lies Beneath...: Castle takes it upon himself to solve the murder of his literary hero but as he digs deeper into the case he learns why people say you should never meet your idols.
Crime mystery with Alison Sweeney. After a man is found dead in a pond, his wife is put on trial for murder. Podcaster Alex McPherson is convinced she's innocent, but can she prove it in time? (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Crime mystery with Alison Sweeney. After a man is found dead in a pond, his wife is put on trial for murder. Podcaster Alex McPherson is convinced she's innocent, but can she prove it in time? (2019)
Drill for Death: Dr Sloan and the team investigate when an unpopular nursing administrator is killed during a routine emergency drill at Community General.
Rain of Terror: Dr Sloan and Amanda's evening at a dinner party takes an unexpected twist when a murder is committed.
Southern Double-Cross: Does Jessica get more than she bargained for during a trip to Australia? Will a dispute over 130,000 acres of land prove to be a motive for murder?
Race To Death: Jessica investigates the intense rivalry between two yacht captains when one of them is murdered on the eve of a prestigious competition.
Cold Case: Sue re-opens a cold case to fulfil a dying mother's wish to see her daughter's killer brought to justice; Jack, Myles and Bobby are enlisted in a charity bachelor auction.
The Nose: When an art courier is murdered, the only witness to the crime is a sufferer of hyperosmia, a rare disorder heightening her sense of smell.
The Man in the Woods: Carrie becomes embroiled in a murder case in Syracuse that closely resembles her sister's death.
Aguna Matatala: Mary investigates when an Orthodox Jewish witness realizes he's being followed by a strange man. Meanwhile, Peter asks an excited Brandi to be his date at the Governor's Ball.
...Day: Crime thriller starring Dylan Neal. After buying a rare cookery book, chef Henry finds himself at the centre of a murder mystery. Can the answers be found within the book itself? (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Day: Crime thriller starring Dylan Neal. After buying a rare cookery book, chef Henry finds himself at the centre of a murder mystery. Can the answers be found within the book itself? (2020)
...By Text: Mystery thriller with Lori Loughlin and Sarah Strange. After texting a suicide note to her bandmates, a bassist is found dead. (2017)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...By Text: Mystery thriller with Lori Loughlin and Sarah Strange. After texting a suicide note to her bandmates, a bassist is found dead. (2017)
A troubled young girl grows obsessed with the author of a series of self-help books, who has recently become her neighbour. Starring Nicky Whelan. (2018)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Tense drama with Lynn Collins. After a whirlwind wedding, a single mother finds herself committed to an institution when her husband plans to take everything she has...including her daughter (2015).
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

...Bitter Than Death: Murder mystery with Courtney Thorne-Smith. Emma investigates when the president of an archaeological organisation is poisoned - unearthing more than she bargained for! (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Bitter Than Death: Murder mystery with Courtney Thorne-Smith. Emma investigates when the president of an archaeological organisation is poisoned - unearthing more than she bargained for! (2019)
Aguna Matatala: Mary investigates when an Orthodox Jewish witness realizes he's being followed by a strange man. Meanwhile, Peter asks an excited Brandi to be his date at the Governor's Ball.
The Nose: When an art courier is murdered, the only witness to the crime is a sufferer of hyperosmia, a rare disorder heightening her sense of smell.
...Cobbler Mystery: A rival bakery has opened, and its owners seem as sweet as pie. But when one of them is murdered, can Hannah cobble together the clues to find a killer? (2016)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Cobbler Mystery: A rival bakery has opened, and its owners seem as sweet as pie. But when one of them is murdered, can Hannah cobble together the clues to find a killer? (2016)
Baby Boom: Can Dr Sloan and the team hold their nerve when a man holds an entire antenatal class hostage?
Talked to Death: Dr Sloan investigates when a daytime talk show host is killed in suspicious circumstances. Can he unearth whether the presenter's death was a result of a tragic prank?
What You Don't Know Can Kill You: Joy soon turns to sorrow when Seth's niece comes to Cabot Cove ahead of her wedding.
Mrs. Parker's Revenge: A room mix-up soon reveals a complicated case involving a lethal chemical virus, nation security agents and a ruthless arms dealer.
The Newlywed Game: Sue and Jack go undercover as a newlywed couple in order to track down a dangerous terrorist suspected of plotting an attack on Washington, D.C. (Part 1 of 2)
Cool Boys: Castle's frenemy Detective Slaughter enlists his help in solving a robbery case. But when a body is found linking Slaughter to the crime, the case takes a shocking turn.
Bigtime: A wealthy real estate developer turns to Carrie and Al for help when his 11-year-old daughter is kidnapped.
One Night Stan: Stan is implicated in the murder of his first witness after his badge is found with the witness's bones. Mary and Marshall learn about a 20-year-old love triangle.
...Evidence: Murder mystery with singer Jewel. A home renovation expert uncovers more than dry rot when the bones of a long-missing girl are found in her current project. (2017)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Evidence: Murder mystery with singer Jewel. A home renovation expert uncovers more than dry rot when the bones of a long-missing girl are found in her current project. (2017)
...Malice: No one digs a mystery like archaeologist Emma Fielding - so when a colleague is murdered in a crypt, she soon unearths a long list of suspects... (2018)
